text:
from the original /usr/local/libexec/mc/extfs.d/uzip 

-----
# Location of the zip program
my $app_zip = "/usr/bin/zip";
# Location of the unzip program
my $app_unzip = $ENV{MC_TEST_EXTFS_LIST_CMD} || "/usr/local/bin/unzip";
------

but zip is located to : /usr/local/bin/zip
and unzip to:  /usr/bin/unzip


thx
